offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: The Sonos Beam (Gen 2) soundbar might be compact, but it packs a serious punch. Supercharge your movie watching with immersive Dolby Atmos virtual surround sound, and hear planes zooming overhead, footsteps walking across the room and more.
goodToKnow: It's the same compact size as the Sonos Beam Gen 1, but with an elegant new perforated grill
Connect to Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant for hands-free voice commands
Use Apple AirPlay 2 to stream directly from your Apple device
Use Sonos TruPlay on your iOS device to perfectly tune the acoustics of your room
It takes just two cables to connect to your TV. Plus there's a handy step by step app
The Sonos Beam 2 syncs to your TV, so it can be easily controlled with your TV remote
